channel.title: Oldies TAL Feed
channel.description: Random episode 10+ years old, updated weekly

item.title: [Oldies] 42: Get Over It!
item.description:
https://www.thisamericanlife.org/42/get-over-it

Three stories of people trying to forget the past and move on.

Act One
Host Ira Glass talks about the drama of trying to be "just friends" with an ex-girlfriend. The meaning of the title will be clear if you hear the piece. (17 minutes) by Ira Glass

Act Two
Fiction writer George Saunders reads his story "Offloading for Mrs Schwartz," from his book CivilWarLand in Bad Decline . It's the story of someone who can't get over the death of his ex-wife.. (23 minutes) by George Saunders

Act Three
Who among us has not wanted amnesia to help get over someone or something? But the problem with amnesia is that it happens a lot more in TV shows and movies and novels than it does in real life. We send reporter Scott Carrier to find someone who really has had amnesia. It's such a difficult assignment that at some point, he visits a hypnotist and asks her to take his memory away. (15 minutes) by Scott Carrier

Originally Aired: 1996-11-15[download](https://www.thisamericanlife.org/sites/default/files/audio/42/Lkq3xISe80tCllqhGz047iP3nFrj9jsnB85L_tJF95E/42.mp3)
